flashcards.definition: Climate pattern of Pacific Ocean temperature oscillation; El Niño (warm) and La Niña (cool) affect global weather.
A band of cold air circling the Arctic; when it weakens, it can allow frigid air to plunge into mid-latitudes.
Extended period of below-normal precipitation causing water shortages; can be worsened by higher temperatures increasing evaporation.
Prolonged period of excessive heat; exacerbated by urban heat islands, humidity, and climate change.
Field that determines how much climate change contributed to the likelihood or intensity of a specific weather event.
